name: Boss is mad I filed for my repetitive strain illness—can they fire me?

mainEntity.name: Boss is mad I filed for my repetitive strain illness—can they fire me?

acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah protects against retaliation for valid workers' comp or ODA claims.[9] Filing occupational illness triggers anti-retaliation safeguards. Key factors: prove temporal link between filing and adverse action, document threats. Report to Labor Commission, keep records; wrongful termination suits possible. Your job is protected during claims.
